title: Find Where Undefined
text: The function is undefined where the denominator equals zero. Set $$x-6$$ $$=$$ $$0$$ to find $$x$$ $$=$$ $$6$$ is a problem point.

title: Factor the Numerator
text: Factor $$x^2-6x$$ by pulling out an x: $$x^2-6x$$ $$=$$ $$x(x-6)$$. So f(x) $$=$$ $$\frac{x\left(x-6\right)}{x-6}$$.

title: Simplify
text: The $$(x-6)$$ factors cancel, leaving f(x) $$=$$ $$x$$ for all $$x$$ $$ \neq $$ $$6$$. The graph is the line $$y=x$$ with a hole at $$x=6$$.

title: Classify
text: Since the discontinuity can be "removed" by redefining f(6) $$=$$ $$6$$, this is a removable discontinuity.
